title: Cutlery Set, 32 Piece Stainless Steel Flatware Set Including Knives Forks Spoons Teaspoons Cutlery Set for 8 People, Mirror Polish Finish, Dishwasher Safe, Multipurpose Use for Home Restaurant Hotel
description: Product Description This glamorous and contemporary 32-piece cutlery set was designed exclusively and offers a chic look for every kitchen. The cutlery set consists six knives, forks, spoons and teaspoons, and each piece is made of high quality 18/10 stainless steel, making them clean and fantastic in the dishwasher. This cutlery set is ideal for updating a dining table with a sophisticated air. Specifications: Set includes: 8 knives, 8 forks, 8 spoons and 8 teaspoons. Material: high quality 18/10 stainless steel Color: silver Knife size: 21 * 1.9 cm / 8.3 * 0.7 inches Fork size: 20 * 2.2 cm / 7.9 * 0.9 inches Spoon size: 19.4 * 4.2 cm / 7.6 * 1.7 inches Teaspoon Size: 14.8 * 2.9cm / 5.8 * 1.1 inches Package weight: 1400g / 49.4oz Package size: 24 * 6.7 * 6.7 cm / 9.4 * 2.6 * 2.6 inches.
